Technical Specification Sheet

Access Control & Entry

IP Door Entry & Credential Management Engineered to BS EN 60839 Standards.

[Technical Asset: Access Control & Entry]Asset pending final approval.

Engineering Architecture

We deploy multi-flat IP door entry panels and encrypted proximity reader networks that seamlessly integrate with video intercoms. Systems provide immutable audit trails for commercial facilities and managed residential blocks while maintaining strict fail-safe fire evacuation override protocols.

Procurement Compliance Standards

All systems specified on this schedule adhere strictly to British Standards (BS EN guidelines) and incorporate privacy-masking features to satisfy UK GDPR digital evidence requirements. We specify energy-efficient equipment sized to actual site risk rather than inflating invoice values.

Entry AuthenticationEncrypted Proximity FOBs, Mobile Bluetooth Credentials & PIN Keypads

Engineering Definition: Multi-factor authentication supporting RFID smart cards and touchless smartphone BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) unlocking.

Communal PanelsMulti-Flat IP Video Door Entry Panels with HD Camera & Two-Way Audio

Engineering Definition: Power-over-Ethernet visitor intercoms with wide-angle camera lenses and noise-canceling microphones.

Locking HardwareMonitored Magnetic Locks (Maglocks), Electric Strikes & Request-to-Exit Buttons

Engineering Definition: High-holding force electromagnetic locks paired with mechanical egress sensors to verify door physical status.

Remote ConnectivityGSM Intercom Gateways for Remote Access Control Without Wired Cabling

Engineering Definition: Cellular 4G communication modules that route gate intercom calls directly to mobile handsets or reception desks.

Fire Safety IntegrationAutomated Fail-Safe Drop-Out Relay Integration with Building Fire Alarms

Engineering Definition: Life-safety electrical interlock that automatically cuts power to magnetic locks upon fire alarm activation to ensure unimpeded emergency egress.

Audit & ComplianceTime-Stamped Event Logging with UK GDPR Compliant Credential Storage

Engineering Definition: Encrypted local event logs recording exact entry timestamps without storing unencrypted biometric or personal resident data.

Hardware Schedule

Current Deployed Hardware Range.

Range discipline: we specify quality-verified equipment from established manufacturers, backed by documented handover packs.

Component SKUTechnical SpecificationTypical Deployment Use
Multi-Flat IP Entry PanelCommunal IP video intercom with wide-angle camera, RFID reader & illuminated keypadMain residential block & commercial building entrance doors
Video Door Phone System7-inch indoor touchscreen monitor with instant door unlock & two-way talkbackIndividual residential apartments & concierge reception desks
Proximity / Mobile ReaderIP65 weather-resistant multi-technology reader supporting RFID card and smartphone BLE accessInternal office doors, stairwells & restricted server rooms
Monitored Maglock & Strike1200lb holding force magnetic locks and heavy-duty fail-secure mechanical strikesHigh-security perimeter doors & fire escape routes
GSM Gate IntercomCellular 4G/GSM intercom unit with SIM dial-to-open and PIN code functionalityRemote perimeter gates & temporary construction phase access
